headline: A Look At SBA Communications (SBAC) Valuation After Recent Share Price Volatility
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot SBA Communications (SBAC) has drawn investor attention after its stock fell about 7% over the past month, even as the company continues to generate revenue of US$2.85b and net income of US$1.02b. See our latest analysis for SBA Communications. The recent 7.05% 1 month share price decline comes after a modest 2.93% 3 month share price gain, while the 1 year total shareholder return is down 10%, indicating momentum has been fading over a longer...
